change: Fixed spinnerVerbs schema — kb.sh wrote bare array, Claude Code expects {mode, verbs} object
rationale: Spinners were DOA since they were added. Claude Code settings.local.json requires spinnerVerbs to be an object with mode and verbs keys, not a raw array.

change: Aligned prompt skeleton with codex format — Commands, Architecture, Context, Task, Acceptance Criteria
rationale: GPT-5.4 performs best with commands at top, architecture for orientation, then task. sun-tzu was not using the same skeleton as codex.
GPT-5.4 at high reasoning can exceed 10 min on complex prompts. 10 min timeout caused premature kills.
Codex prompt skeleton starts with Commands section. KRS-One's assignment template needed to include build/test/lint commands so codex can place them correctly.

change: Rewrote DON'Ts as mechanism explanation — GPT-5.4 writes to disk, CLI output is diagnostics
rationale: Instruction-based DON'Ts were ignored. Explaining the mechanism (why the output format is the way it is) is more durable than commands.

change: Created kiln-forge plugin development toolkit — SKILL.md, 6 workflows, 4 references, 3 data files, 3 scenarios, TUI blueprint, evals, health checks
rationale: Plugin maintenance was entirely manual — observe smoke tests for hours, log findings in TWEAKS.md, manually edit files. kiln-forge provides structured workflows, validation, tracking, and scenario-based testing.

change: Added WORKERS_SPAWNED confirmation message after Phase C spawn — engine sends message to boss confirming workers are live
rationale: Boss goes idle after REQUEST_WORKERS. Without a wake-up message, boss never sees workers are available and requires manual nudge. Observed in ST11.5 and ST12. Fix: engine always sends WORKERS_SPAWNED to boss after spawning Phase C workers.
